title: Array Technologies Q4 2023 Earnings Preview
text: Zacks Consensus Estimate for fourth-quarter revenues was pegged at $363.3 million, indicating 65.2% improvement from year-ago quarter's reported figure. Zacks Consensus Estimate for fourth-quarter earnings was pegged at 10 cents per share, implying improvement from year-ago quarter's reported loss of 6 cents. Factors like favorable revenue growth, faster than expected delivery of projects and improved gross margin at majority of segments, except STI, were expected to have boosted ARRY's fourth-quarter earnings. Company later reported that in fourth quarter, it delivered $342 million in revenue above top end of guidance range provided on Q3 earnings call and grew approximately 15% from prior year period. Additionally, adjusted gross margins expanded by 520 basis points on year-over-year basis to 25.7%.
